title: Iron Mountain: Wide Moat, Record Earnings, 5% Dividend Hike
text: Iron Mountain is a global leader in storage and information management services, with strong earnings and revenue growth. The company's Global RIM segment, which includes records management, contributes the majority of its revenues. IRM's board of directors authorized a 5% increase in the quarterly dividend, indicating confidence in the company's financial performance.

title: Iron Mountain (IRM) Q2 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Iron Mountain (IRM) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.94 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.93 per share. This compares to FFO of $0.93 per share a year ago.

title: Iron Mountain Increases Quarterly Dividend per Share by 5%
